Discover Our Story Partner With Us

ASSIST is a self-sustaining, Pan-Asian non-profit with a vision to drive sustainable transformation across Asia. Founded in 2003 in Makati City, Philippines, what began as a small team with a bold vision has grown into a trusted regional development organisation with offices across six countries.

We believe that partnering with communities, governments, and organisations is the path to building lasting, scalable, and people-centred change. Our "Partner for Progress" philosophy guides every project we design and deliver.

What We Do

ASSIST engages partners through four core modalities — ensuring every form of collaboration is purposeful, structured, and maximises community impact.

CSR Programs

Corporate Social Responsibility

We partner with companies and corporate foundations to design, fund, and implement programs aligned with their ESG goals — spanning food security, health, disaster resilience, livelihoods, and skills development. We bridge business ambition with community reality through structured, measurable interventions.

Volunteering

Corporate Volunteering

Our volunteering programs are built around genuine community needs — creating experiences that are meaningful for employees and valuable for the communities they serve. From skills-based volunteering to hands-on field engagement with farmers, youth, and communities, we design purpose-driven experiences.

Services

Technical & Creative Services

Through our Development Solutions arm and ASSIST Creativelab (ACL), we offer end-to-end development services including capacity building, M&E, eLearning development, communication strategy, knowledge management, research and studies, and project management.

GIK

Gifts In Kind — Goods 4 Good

We transform product donations and pro bono contributions into structured, high-impact interventions — with measurable outcomes and applicable tax benefits. Solar lanterns, water filtration systems, educational tools, and nutrition supplies reach the communities that need them most, with full reporting for donors.

Our Priorities 2025

In 2025, our five thematic areas guided us addressing critical development challenges across Asia with measurable, community-driven impact.

Food Security &
Agriculture

We empower farmers, fishers, and agri-entrepreneurs to build climate-resilient, inclusive, and sustainable food systems across Asia and parts of Africa.

Our Values & Principles

Our values reflect our commitment to integrity, innovation, excellence, and empowerment — guiding how we lead, collaborate with partners, support our colleagues, and serve our communities.

Integrity

We act with transparency, accountability and ethical consistency in everything we do.

RespectGenuinenessAccountability

Innovation

We embrace creative thinking and adaptive approaches to solve complex development challenges.

AgilityCreativityCollaboration & Partnership

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards of quality, rigour, and professional delivery.

Stakeholder DelightGrowthProcess and Goal-oriented

Empowerment

We believe in strengthening the capacity of communities and partners to drive their own change.

TrustCommunicationPassion

2025 Milestones by Quarter

A landmark year marked by international awards, expanding partnerships, and new flagship programs deployed across the region.

Q1 2025 — January to March

Agriculture recognition & solar infrastructure delivery

Silver Award

17th Global CSR & ESG Awards 2025

ESG Leadership Award — AgriSagana with Cargill Philippines at the Global CSR & ESG Summit

Solar PHF Turnover — AgriSagana

Cargill and ASSIST turn over solar-powered post-harvest facilities to corn farming cooperatives in Cagayan Valley — January 24, 2025

Recognition

ASSIST Wins Global CSR Award

Recognised for sustainable agriculture program with Cargill — featured in PRStation and national media — March 19, 2025

Q2 2025 — April to June

Solar lighting, disaster education & awards

Sinag Pag-Asa Launch

ASSIST and Signify Foundation light the path to disaster resiliency — solar lanterns deployed to off-grid communities — April 2, 2025

Shell + MOD Partnership

Shell Pilipinas partners with ASSIST to deploy Master of Disaster in schools nationwide for disaster preparedness education — May 3, 2025

Bronze Award

AMCHAM CSR Impact Awards

Health and Emergency Assistance — TI Philippines Business Continuity & Safety Certification Program

Q3 2025 — July to September

Green skills, nutrition & community solar expansion

GREENvolution — sustainABILITY HR Summit

Landmark summit urging HR practitioners to hire green-skilled graduates. DepEd pilots Circular Explorer curriculum — August 2025

ASSIST & Arla Partnership

ASSIST and Arla Foods launch nutrition education partnerships across communities in the Philippines — July 2, 2025

Sinag Pag-Asa Expansion

ASSIST and Signify Foundation expand solar lighting to additional off-grid communities across the Philippines — August 1, 2025

Q4 2025 — October to December

Major ESG awards, national media features & program expansions

Gold Award

Inquirer ESG Impact Awards 2025

Gold — Human Rights & Labor Standards (ANNAKKO); Silver — Talent Management (sustainABILITY); Silver — Waste Management (Circular Explorer) — October 2, 2025

Gold Award

1st Asia ESG Positive Impact Awards

Gold — Human Rights & Labor Standards (ANNAKKO). Pru Life UK expands climate resilience in Bantayan Island — November 2025

MOD Goes National — ABS-CBN Feature

Master of Disaster featured on ABS-CBN News; "Filipinos master disaster readiness, one roll of the dice at a time" — December 29, 2025

2025 Key Programs

ASSIST's 2025 portfolio demonstrates the depth and breadth of our regional impact across the Philippines, Vietnam, India, and beyond.

🇵🇭 Philippines

AgriSagana 2

Partner: Cargill Philippines

Strengthening Filipino corn farmers in Cagayan Valley through skills training, solar-powered post-harvest infrastructure, and market linkages. Reduces post-harvest losses and connects smallholders to formal markets.

70,000+ farmers reached; Solar PHFs turned over to cooperatives
🇵🇭 Philippines

CocoGrow

Partner: Cargill Philippines

Revitalising Sarangani Province's coconut industry through modern farming practices, integrated pest management training, and sustainable market access. Builds a more resilient coconut value chain.

Coconut farmers trained; coconut value chain revitalised in Sarangani
🇻🇳 Vietnam

Aqua Xanh

Partner: KFW DEG / International Partners

Building climate-resilient aquaculture in Vietnam's Mekong Delta. Capacitates smallholder farmers on sustainable pond management, climate adaptation, and responsible supply chains.

Climate-resilient aquaculture introduced across the Mekong Delta
🇮🇳 India

MILK Project Phase 2

Partner: KFW DEG / Tirumala Milk

Modernising India's smallholder dairy sector by improving sustainable milk production, cattle health management, and dairy farmer income through model farms and veterinary training.

350+ dairy farmers trained; 2 integrated model dairy farms established
🇵🇭 Philippines (Bantayan Island)

Ulan Alang sa Bantayan

Partner: Pru Life UK

Installing rainwater catchment systems on Bantayan Island in Cebu — a region frequently hit by typhoons. Combines infrastructure with community WASH training for lasting water security.

325 families aided; 6 communities reached; 20+ units deployed
🇵🇭 Philippines (Mindoro)

SOURCe — Water Filtration

Partner: Poul Due Jensen / Grundfos Foundation

Empowering Indigenous and rural communities in Mindoro with solar-powered water filtration systems and community-based water management training for sustainable clean water access.

Solar-powered filtration installed; community operators trained
🇵🇭 Philippines

Allianz PNB Life Nutrikaalaman

Partner: Allianz PNB Life / Arla Foods

Delivering nutrition education to youth athletes, students, and corporate employees through interactive sessions promoting evidence-based nutrition and healthier lifestyles.

200+ individuals benefited; nationwide corporate wellness reach
🇵🇭 Philippines — National

Master of Disaster — National Rollout

Partner: Shell Philippines, Malayan Insurance, DepEd

ASSIST's flagship DRR board game deployed in schools nationwide. DepEd piloted the accompanying curriculum. Featured on ABS-CBN and DZMM Teleradyo. Children aged 7+ learn disaster preparedness through play.

5,000+ schools engaged; 20,000+ board games distributed
🇵🇭 Philippines — Multiple Regions

Sinag Pag-Asa Phase 3

Partner: Signify Foundation

Distributing solar floodlights and lanterns to off-grid, disaster-vulnerable communities including Indigenous Peoples and remote Barangays — reducing darkness during calamities and enabling community safety.

1,281+ solar lights and preparedness equipment distributed
🇵🇭 Philippines

sustainABILITY

Partner: Multiple Corporate Partners

Building green workforce skills through TVIs, industry partnerships, and green skills training. The 2025 HR Summit "GREENvolution" called HR professionals to hire green-skilled graduates.

2M+ individuals trained; Silver — Inquirer ESG Awards 2025
🇵🇭 Philippines (Ilocos Sur)

ANNAKKO — Anti-Child Labor

Partner: Multiple Partners

Protecting children in Ilocos Sur from child labour through education, community engagement, leadership camps, and talent development. Double Gold award winner in 2025.

Gold — Asia ESG Positive Impact Awards & Inquirer ESG Awards 2025
🇵🇭 Philippines — Mindanao

Adopt-a-Madrasah

Partner: Pru Life UK

Strengthening madrasah communities through technology integration, functional literacy, financial education, and teacher capacity building across Mindanao. Bronze Stevie Award winner 2026.

Bronze Stevie Award 2026; madrasah communities technology-enabled
🇻🇳 Vietnam

Digi-Connect Phase 2

Partner: DIGI-TEXX / International Partners

Bridging digital skills gaps in Vietnam's BPO industry while uplifting marginalised and rural communities. Focus on women, persons with disabilities, and unemployed youth.

11,000+ beneficiaries; 8 modules delivered; women-focused
🇵🇭 Philippines

Circular Explorer

Partner: Multiple Corporate & NGO Partners

Catamaran-based plastic collection initiative recovering ocean plastic through renewable energy and education. DepEd piloted the Circular Explorer books and curriculum in schools nationwide in 2025.

DepEd pilot launched; Silver — Inquirer ESG Awards (Waste Management)
🇵🇭 Philippines — Noveleta, Cavite

Noveleta Mangrove Rehabilitation

Partner: Wells Fargo Foundation

Rehabilitating Noveleta's coastline through large-scale mangrove planting, community training on ecosystem stewardship, and disaster resilience-building for coastal communities.

80,000+ trees planted; 6,000+ volunteers mobilised

Partner for Progress
